threadTitle: Things that instantly reveal you just moved here
body: You still think ‘The Lizard’ is a cocktail bar and not just a local pub with a dodgy jukebox.
Caught a whiff of fried fish on the 59 last night, turned out it was just a sleeping bloke’s takeaway spilling everywhere.

threadTitle: When you knew you were actually living here
body: It hit me when I saw a guy in a full suit bartering for a kebab at 2 AM, while street musicians played 'Wonderwall' in the background.

threadTitle: Things Berlin does that nowhere else does
body: You can catch a bus while people are rallying around it; the occasional protest just adds flair to the daily commute here.

threadTitle: Real signs someone is from here vs just working here
body: You can spot a local by their ability to navigate around the BART shutdowns. Tourists just stand there confused, staring at the platform.

threadTitle: Muni moments that define this city
body: Caught two teens arguing over the best taco spot while wedged between a guy snoring and a woman selling homemade crafts on the 14. Classic Muni.

threadTitle: Things tourists get wrong about living here
body: Tourists think the 'traditional' tapas bars serve the best, but the real gems are the unmarked places tucked away in the side streets.

threadTitle: How to spot a recent arrival
body: You can tell a recent arrival by their bewildered expression while navigating the packed Mercat de la Llibertat on a Saturday morning.

threadTitle: Things that instantly reveal you just moved here
body: You keep asking for the 'nearest tube' at every bus stop, like there’s supposed to be one around the corner.
Caught a night bus from Brixton to Clapham and a guy was playing air guitar to the driver’s tunes. Best part? Everyone joined in by the last stop.

threadTitle: When you knew you were actually living here
body: When I heard a group of kids arguing passionately about the best kebab spot on Hermannstraße—now that's local culture.

threadTitle: Things Berlin does that nowhere else does
body: Only in Kreuzberg will you find a kebab shop that serves its döner with a side of funky techno beats. Late-night bites never felt so alive.

threadTitle: Real signs someone is from here vs just working here
body: You know someone’s a local if they don't flinch at the BART delays but still complain about the taco truck line at 10 PM on a Friday.

threadTitle: Muni moments that define this city
body: Caught the Muni delayed at Civic Center yesterday—an entire opera troupe got off, all in costume, singing their way down the street. Only in SF.

threadTitle: Things tourists get wrong about living here
body: Tourists think the fountains in Plaça de la Vila are just for decoration, but locals fill their water bottles daily. It's our secret hydration spot.

threadTitle: How to spot a recent arrival
body: You'll catch them staring at the tanned locals playing petanca at Parc de l'Estrella, trying to figure out if it's a sport or just another casual hangout.
